sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: HEDF/N Stock Fund Price and Chart — BIVA:HEDF/N

feed.title: Workhorse Group Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: Workhorse Group reported its Q4 and full-year 2025 earnings, highlighting the completion of its merger with Motiv Electric Trucks. The company outlined its strategy to achieve profitability by focusing on cost synergies, expanding its product portfolio, and strengthening its financial position, targeting cash flow breakeven by the end of 2028 through a modest market share of 1% or 2,500 vehicles annually. Despite continued financial challenges, including negative gross margins and net losses in Q4 2025, the company expressed confidence in its existing manufacturing capacity and a clear path to make its electric trucks competitive with internal combustion engine vehicles in terms of pricing and total cost of ownership.

feed.title: WORLD KINECT (NYSE: WKC) President settles RSUs with 2,604 shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: WORLD KINECT CORP President John Peter Rau had 2,604 shares withheld for taxes on March 28, 2026, stemming from the vesting and settlement of 7,814 restricted stock units. The shares were valued at $23.36 each, the closing price on March 27, 2026. Following this transaction, Rau directly holds 192,837 shares of the company's common stock.

feed.title: WORLD KINECT (WKC) CEO has RSUs vest, shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: WORLD KINECT CORP's CEO, Ira M. Birns, reported a routine tax-withholding transaction where 2,741 shares of common stock were withheld to cover the tax liability from 7,814 vested restricted stock units. The shares were valued at $23.36 each. Following this transaction, Birns directly holds 269,409 shares of the company.

feed.title: Wheaton Precious Metals (NYSE: WPM) files Form 40-F and sets 2026 shareholder meeting
feed.summary: Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. has filed its Form 40-F report and 2025 audited financial statements with the SEC, which are available on EDGAR and the company's website. The company will hold its Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders on May 8, 2026, at 1:30 p.m. Eastern Time, both virtually and in-person at the Conrad Hotel New York Downtown. Registered shareholders and duly appointed proxyholders can participate and vote online, while guests can listen but not vote or ask questions.

feed.title: Wheaton Precious Metals Provides Details of Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders and Files Form 40-F
feed.summary: Wheaton Precious Metals Corp. announced the filing of its Form 40-F report with the SEC and provided details for its Annual and Special Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting will be held virtually and in-person on Friday, May 8, 2026, at 1:30 p.m. Eastern Time, allowing shareholders to participate and vote online or attend in New York. The company also highlighted its business model as a premier precious metals streaming company focused on strong ESG practices.

feed.title: VTS (NYSE) insider sells 70,142 shares; multiple 2026 dispositions
feed.summary: Vitesse Energy (NYSE: VTS) recently reported insider share sales, including a proposed sale of 50,000 shares and multiple dispositions by Brian Cree between January and March 2026. The largest single sale by Cree involved 70,142 shares for over $1.3 million on March 31, 2026, handled by Wells Fargo Clearing Services. These transactions are considered routine dispositions, and further details on holdings or plans may be provided in subsequent filings.

feed.summary: WEX, Inc. has recently formed a Death Cross, a technical indicator suggesting a potential bearish trend. The stock has underperformed the S&P 500 significantly over the past year, and its daily moving averages and MACD indicators further reinforce a bearish outlook. Investors are advised to exercise caution due to these challenging market conditions.

feed.title: US Foods (NYSE: USFD) CFO sale, large gift and trust transfers
feed.summary: US Foods Holding Corp. EVP and CFO Dirk J. Locascio engaged in several stock transactions on March 30, 2026. He sold 20,000 shares of USFD stock at $91.19 per share under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan. Additionally, Locascio made a bona fide gift of 85,464 shares and transferred 42,732 shares to each of two separate living trusts.

feed.title: Vision Marine Locks In 2026 Output as Commercial Demand for Electric Boats Surges
feed.summary: Vision Marine Technologies has announced that its 2026 electric boat production is largely committed due to increasing commercial and retail demand across various markets. The company attributes this to recurring orders from fleet operators and expanded distribution through Nautical Ventures, strengthening its position in the electric boating sector. Despite this demand, TipRanks' AI Analyst Spark gives VMAR a "Neutral" rating due to weak financial quality and bearish technicals.

feed.title: Wayfair (NYSE: W) director updates holdings after 56,000-share transfer
feed.summary: Wayfair Inc. director Michael Andrew Kumin reported updated equity holdings and a new stock award. He received 3,176 shares of Class A Common Stock as restricted stock units, which will vest quarterly starting May 1, 2026. Additionally, 56,000 shares previously held by TOF Capital were transferred to his direct individual ownership, bringing his total direct beneficial ownership to 319,753 shares.

feed.title: Santander (WBS) files merger pact, seeks OCC approval for bank merger
feed.summary: Santander Holdings USA, Inc. has filed agreement documents and regulatory filings for Banco Santander’s proposed acquisition of Webster Financial Corporation, including a bank-level merger. An Agreement and Plan of Merger was executed on March 30, 2026, and Santander Bank, N.A. submitted a Bank Merger Act application to the OCC for approval. The bank merger is contingent upon the closing of the HoldCo Transactions and the necessary regulatory approvals.

feed.title: VolitionRX (VNRX) Rating Maintained as Buy by D. Boral Capital
feed.summary: Analyst Jason Kolbert from D. Boral Capital has maintained a 'Buy' rating for VolitionRX (VNRX) with an unchanged price target of $3.00 USD. This reiteration reflects consistent confidence in the company's prospects, with historical ratings showing a steady 'Buy' status. The average target price from 5 analysts is $2.06, suggesting a significant upside of 984.21% from the current price, while GuruFocus estimates a fair value of $1.40 for VNRX.

feed.title: Catheter Precision (NYSE: VTAK) posts 2025 loss, revenue up 95% and buys Flyte aviation unit
feed.summary: Catheter Precision (NYSE: VTAK) reported a 95% revenue increase in 2025, reaching $819 thousand, but posted a GAAP net loss of $17.7 million. Despite the growth, the company highlights significant liquidity risks, stating it needs additional financing to fund operations through fiscal year 2026. VTAK has also strategically diversified by acquiring Flyte, a regional air mobility company, creating two distinct operating platforms in medical devices and aviation.

feed.title: Short Interest in Vroom, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRM) Grows By 20.9%
feed.summary: Vroom, Inc. (NASDAQ:VRM) experienced a significant 20.9% increase in short interest during March, reaching 48,536 shares, representing 0.9% of the stock. The company reported negative earnings per share and net margin, alongside a high debt-to-equity ratio, with institutional investors holding approximately 25.8% of the shares.

feed.title: [6-K] Viking Holdings Ltd Current Report (Foreign Issuer) | VIK SEC Filing - Form 6-K
feed.summary: Viking Holdings Ltd has scheduled its 2026 Annual General Meeting of Shareholders for May 13, 2026, to be held virtually. Shareholders will vote on director nominees, the appointment of Torstein Hagen as Chairman, and the reappointment of Ernst & Young AS as auditor. The company reported strong financial performance for 2025 with $6.5 billion in revenue, a 7.4% increase in Net Yields, and 38.8% growth in Adjusted EBITDA.

feed.title: V F Corp (VFC) director defers fees into 1,524 phantom stock units
feed.summary: V F Corp director Mark Samuel Hoplamazian acquired 1,524.390 phantom stock units by deferring director fees. These units, valued at $16.40 each, track the value of V F Corp common stock and will be settled in cash upon his retirement. Following this transaction, Hoplamazian holds a total of 29,225.0621 phantom stock units.

feed.title: V F Corp (VFC) director defers fees into 1,905 phantom stock units
feed.summary: V F Corp director Matthew J. Shattock has increased his deferred compensation by acquiring 1,905.488 phantom stock units. These units, which track VF's share price and dividends, were credited at $16.40 per unit as part of his director fees and will be settled in cash upon his retirement. This transaction increased his total phantom stock holdings under the company's Directors Deferred Savings Plan to 41,402.862 units.

feed.title: Valmont Industries, Inc. Announces Timing of First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
feed.summary: Valmont Industries, Inc. will release its first quarter 2026 financial results on Tuesday, April 21, 2026, before market open. A webcast and conference call will follow at 8:00 a.m. CT with President and CEO Avner M. Applbaum and CFO Thomas Liguori to discuss the results. Participants can join via phone or webcast, with a replay available until April 28, 2026.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: Venu Holding’s Q4 2025 sees asset growth, stock uptick
feed.summary: Venu Holding Corporation reported robust Q4 2025 results, with total assets doubling to $370 million and premium seating sales surging by 62%. Despite a slight revenue decline, the stock rose by 6.09% in aftermarket trading, driven by strong asset growth and strategic initiatives, including a $14 million sale-leaseback transaction. Executives highlighted future growth plans like new venue openings and an upcoming ambitious sales campaign, while the company addresses a valuation disconnect with its current market capitalization being lower than appraised assets.

feed.title: MDJM (UOKA) seeks big capital increase and 2:1–200:1 share consolidation
feed.summary: MDJM LTD is calling an extraordinary general meeting on April 21, 2026, to propose a significant increase in its authorized share capital and a flexible share consolidation ranging from 2:1 to 200:1. The company's Class A shares were suspended from Nasdaq due to falling below the $1.00 minimum bid price requirement and moved to OTC trading, making the share consolidation a crucial step to potentially regain Nasdaq compliance. This move aims to mechanically raise the share price and create capacity for future share issuance, although no specific issuance plans are detailed in this filing.

feed.title: Vocodia Holdings (OTC: VHABW) delays 2025 10-K filing to complete audit procedures
feed.summary: Vocodia Holdings Corp. (OTC: VHABW) has filed a Form 12b-25 with the SEC, indicating a delay in filing its annual report on Form 10-K for the period ending December 31, 2025. The company stated that additional time is required to complete its audit procedures. This notification, signed by the CEO on March 31, 2026, does not anticipate any significant changes in operational results from the previous fiscal year.

feed.title: Apple tests Siri feature that handles multiple commands at once
feed.summary: Apple is testing a new Siri feature as part of its upcoming iOS 27, iPadOS 27, and macOS 27 updates that will allow the digital assistant to process multiple requests in a single query. This move aims to modernize Siri and bring it closer to the capabilities of other advanced AI assistants. The company plans to unveil the new Siri and other "Apple Intelligence" features at its Worldwide Developers Conference on June 8.

feed.title: Iran Conflict Puts Helium And Growth Expectations At Risk For Applied Materials
feed.summary: The ongoing conflict involving Iran poses a significant threat to the semiconductor industry due to its potential impact on helium supply, a critical input for chip fabrication. Applied Materials, a major semiconductor equipment supplier, is vulnerable to these disruptions, which could affect production schedules and costs for its customers. Despite strong past performance, the company and its investors need to monitor management's contingency plans and customer exposure to geopolitical risks.

feed.title: A Look At Viking Therapeutics (VKTX) Valuation As VANQUISH 2 Enrollment Milestone Advances VK2735 Program
feed.summary: Viking Therapeutics (VKTX) has completed patient enrollment for its Phase 3 VANQUISH-2 trial of VK2735, a dual GLP-1/GIP agonist for obesity and type 2 diabetes. Despite recent share price volatility, the company is seen as significantly undervalued by Simply Wall St's narrative fair value of $92.72, compared to its current price of $32.54. This valuation hinges on the future potential of its obesity franchise, though risks include high R&D spending and reliance on VK2735.

feed.title: Kraft Heinz Stock On Fire: Up 6.0% With 6-Day Winning Streak
feed.summary: The article reports that Kraft Heinz stock is experiencing a significant rally, up 6.0% and maintaining a six-day winning streak. The content provided is minimal, focusing almost entirely on this positive stock performance.

feed.title: Sempra Stock On Fire: Up 5.9% With 7-Day Winning Streak
feed.summary: Sempra stock has experienced a significant upturn, rising 5.9% and achieving a seven-day winning streak. This article highlights the strong recent performance of the company's stock.

feed.title: VSee Health 2025 10-K: Revenue $14.6M, Loss per Share $(0.73)
feed.summary: VSee Health reported 2025 revenue of $14.62 million, a 40% increase attributed to the iDoc acquisition and higher telehealth volume. The company saw a net loss of $(14.74) million and a loss per share of $(0.73), an improvement from the prior year due to the absence of a goodwill impairment charge. Gross margin slightly increased to $7.36 million, and the company expanded its telecritical care, VSee Lab SaaS subscriptions, and professional EEG services.

feed.title: Vontier Secures $300 Million 364-Day Unsecured Term Loan With PNC Bank
feed.summary: Vontier has secured a $300 million 364-day senior unsecured term loan facility with PNC Bank and a syndicate of lenders. This loan, signed on March 31, 2026, aims to bolster Vontier's liquidity and provide financial flexibility for general corporate purposes. The interest rate for this loan will vary based on Vontier's long-term credit ratings.

feed.title: Vontier (NYSE: VNT) secures new 364-day $300M senior unsecured loan
feed.summary: Vontier Corporation secured a new 364-day, $300 million senior unsecured term loan facility from a syndicate of lenders with PNC Bank, National Association, as administrative agent. The loan matures on March 30, 2027, providing short-term funding capacity. Interest rates are variable, tied to either Term SOFR or a Base Rate, plus a margin determined by Vontier's long-term debt credit ratings.

feed.title: United Therapeutics (UTHR) CEO sells 9,500 shares under 10b5-1 plan

The transactions involved exercising options at $146.03 per share and selling shares between approximately $581-$603, totaling a net sale of $5.61 million. This activity is considered routine diversification, with Rothblatt retaining substantial direct and indirect holdings in the company.

feed.title: ProShares Ultra Semiconductors urges diversification as market volatility mounts
feed.summary: ProShares Ultra Semiconductors is advocating for increased portfolio diversification as a response to current market uncertainties and geopolitical conflicts. Simeon Hyman, Global Investment Strategist at ProShares, highlighted the importance of investing in companies that manage essential assets on Schwab Network, noting that diversified portfolios have historically demonstrated greater resilience during volatile periods. This advice aligns with the firm's ongoing emphasis on exposure to diversified and essential assets.

feed.title: ULH PE Ratio & Valuation, Is ULH Overvalued
feed.summary: Universal Logistics Holdings Inc (ULH) is currently considered overvalued, with its forward PE ratio of 23.33 significantly higher than its five-year average of 8.86. The fair price for ULH, based on relative valuation, is estimated to be between $6.68 and $13.96, indicating that the current price of $21.14 is overvalued by 51.47%. Additionally, ULH's P/S ratio is above the industry average, which is deemed unsustainable given its negative revenue growth.

feed.title: Universal Logistics (ULH) details 2026 shareholder votes, Moroun control and executive pay
feed.summary: Universal Logistics Holdings, Inc. (ULH) has released details for its 2026 annual stockholder meeting on April 29, 2026, where shareholders will vote on the election of nine directors, the non-binding approval of executive compensation, and the ratification of Ernst & Young LLP as the independent auditor. The proxy statement highlights ULH's controlled-company status, with Moroun family trusts holding 72.9% of common stock, and outlines executive compensation plans for CEO Tim Phillips and CFO Jude Beres, which include salary, cash bonuses, and time-based restricted stock. It also details various related-party transactions with Moroun-affiliated entities for services such as administrative support, insurance, and real estate leasing.
